testcase.name: Employee successfully creates a leave request
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Employee successfully creates a leave request # features/leave-request-service_02_employee-leave-request-management_20260318_162016.feature:4 Given the employee is authenticated # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theEmployeeIsAuthenticated() When the employee submits the leave request with fromDate, toDate, type, and userId # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theEmployeeSubmitsTheLeaveRequestWithFromdateTodateTypeAndUserid() Then the system updates the request status to "Pending" # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theSystemUpdatesTheRequestStatusToString(java.lang.String)

testcase.name: Employee cancels a pending leave request
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Employee cancels a pending leave request # features/leave-request-service_02_employee-leave-request-management_20260318_162016.feature:9 Given the employee is authenticated # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theEmployeeIsAuthenticated() And there is a pending leave request # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.thereIsAPendingLeaveRequest() When the employee cancels the leave request # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theEmployeeCancelsTheLeaveRequest() Then the system updates the request status to "Canceled" # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theSystemUpdatesTheRequestStatusToString(java.lang.String)
testcase.system-err: [main] INFO com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps - Precondition: authenticated [main] INFO com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps - Precondition: pending request id=2 [main] INFO com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps - Using reqId=2 for cancel [main] INFO com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps - PUT cancel reqId=2 -> HTTP 400 [main] INFO com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps - Cancel result HTTP 400: This leave request has already been approved.

testcase.name: Employee cannot cancel a granted leave request
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Employee cannot cancel a granted leave request # features/leave-request-service_02_employee-leave-request-management_20260318_162016.feature:15 Given the employee is authenticated # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theEmployeeIsAuthenticated() And there is a granted leave request # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.thereIsAGrantedLeaveRequest() When the employee tries to cancel the leave request # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theEmployeeTriesToCancelTheLeaveRequest() Then the system displays the error "This request has already been validated." # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theSystemDisplaysTheErrorString(java.lang.String)
testcase.system-err: [main] INFO com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps - Precondition: authenticated [main] INFO com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps - Precondition: granted request id=1 [main] INFO com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps - Using reqId=1 for cancel [main] INFO com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps - PUT cancel reqId=1 -> HTTP 400 [main] INFO com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps - Error HTTP 400: This leave request has already been approved.

testcase.name: Employee cannot cancel a refused leave request
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Employee cannot cancel a refused leave request # features/leave-request-service_02_employee-leave-request-management_20260318_162016.feature:21 Given the employee is authenticated # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theEmployeeIsAuthenticated() And there is a refused leave request # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.thereIsARefusedLeaveRequest() When the employee tries to cancel the leave request # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theEmployeeTriesToCancelTheLeaveRequest() Then the system displays the error "This request has already been refused." # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theSystemDisplaysTheErrorString(java.lang.String)
testcase.system-err: [main] INFO com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps - Precondition: authenticated [main] INFO com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps - Precondition: refused request id=4 [main] INFO com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps - Using reqId=4 for cancel [main] INFO com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps - PUT cancel reqId=4 -> HTTP 400 [main] INFO com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps - Error HTTP 400: Leave request not found.

testcase.name: Employee cannot cancel a canceled leave request
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Employee cannot cancel a canceled leave request # features/leave-request-service_02_employee-leave-request-management_20260318_162016.feature:27 Given the employee is authenticated # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theEmployeeIsAuthenticated() And there is a canceled leave request # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.thereIsACanceledLeaveRequest() When the employee tries to cancel the leave request # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theEmployeeTriesToCancelTheLeaveRequest() Then the system displays the error "This request has been canceled and can no longer be processed." # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theSystemDisplaysTheErrorString(java.lang.String)
testcase.system-err: [main] INFO com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps - Precondition: authenticated [main] INFO com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps - Precondition: canceled request id=5 [main] INFO com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps - Using reqId=26 for cancel [main] INFO com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps - PUT cancel reqId=26 -> HTTP 400 [main] INFO com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps - Error HTTP 400: This leave request has already been approved.

testcase.name: Unauthorized users cannot access leave request endpoints

failure.message: [No HTTP call was made] Expecting actual not to be null

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: [No HTTP call was made] Expecting actual not to be null at com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theSystemBlocksTheAction(LeaveSteps.java:195) at ✽.the system blocks the action(classpath:features/leave-request-service_02_employee-leave-request-management_20260318_162016.feature:36)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Unauthorized users cannot access leave request endpoints # features/leave-request-service_02_employee-leave-request-management_20260318_162016.feature:33 Given there is an unauthorized user # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.thereIsAnUnauthorizedUser() When the user attempts to create a leave request # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theUserAttemptsToCreateALeaveRequest() Then the system blocks the action # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theSystemBlocksTheAction() java.lang.AssertionError: [No HTTP call was made] Expecting actual not to be null at com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theSystemBlocksTheAction(LeaveSteps.java:195) at âœ½.the system blocks the action(classpath:features/leave-request-service_02_employee-leave-request-management_20260318_162016.feature:36)
testcase.system-err: [main] INFO com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps - Precondition: unauthorized user [main] INFO com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps - When (unmatched): the user attempts to create a leave request

testcase.name: Employee cannot create a leave request without required fields
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Employee cannot create a leave request without required fields # features/leave-request-service_02_employee-leave-request-management_20260318_162016.feature:38 Given the employee is authenticated # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theEmployeeIsAuthenticated() When the employee submits the leave request with value # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theEmployeeSubmitsTheLeaveRequestWithValue() And the employee enters all other required fields # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theEmployeeEntersAllOtherRequiredFields() Then the system displays the error "Missing required field: value" # com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps.theSystemDisplaysTheErrorString(java.lang.String)
testcase.system-err: [main] INFO com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps - Precondition: authenticated [main] INFO com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps - POST /api/leave-requests/create (2026-08-01 -> 2026-08-05) -> HTTP 500 [main] INFO com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps - When (unmatched): the employee enters all other required fields [main] INFO com.example.leave.steps.LeaveSteps - Error HTTP 500: {"timestamp":"2026-03-18","status":500,"error":"Internal Server Error","message":"A leave request already exists for this period (Pending or Approved)..","path":"/api/leave-requests/create"}
